\tzpentry{ID4493}{Psi Metamaterial Meta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4493 introduces Psi Metamaterial Meta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \label{eq:psi-metamaterial} \ket{\Psi_{\mathrm{meta}}} = \sum_{i=1}^{3\times 10^9} \ket{\mathrm{DNA\_base}_i} \otimes \ket{\mathrm{DAAN}_{k(i)}} \otimes \ket{\mathrm{Kiss}\big(\lfloor i/153{,}600\rfloor\big)}, \end{equation}
